verses.text: Topa phat un. Topa' tungah la thak sa un. A thuman mite' kikhopna sungah amah phatna sa un
Amah a Bawlpa tungah Israel lungdam hen la, amau' Kumpipa' tungah Zion mite kipak ta hen
Lamna tawh amah phat un la, khuang leh laia lasakna tawh ama tungah la ngaih sa un
Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mite tungah Topa lungdam a, miniamte gualzo sakin a pahtawi hi
A gualzawhna uhah thuman mite lungdamin diang uh hen la, ama mai-ah khukdin'in nuamna la sa uh hen

Minam dangte tungah phu la-in gim a pia ding, a kumpite uh sikkhau tawh henin a miliante uh sikkol a bulh ding, a kigelhsa thukhenna bangin amaute tungah a semkhia dingin langnih a hiam namsau a tawi kawmun Pasian phatin awng ta uh hen. Hih pen Pasian' mite' gualzawhna ahi hi. Topa phat un.
